SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap

Class MagicRuntime

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.MagicRuntime
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class MagicRuntime extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Shared runtime container for MagicUtils-powered plugins and mods.

The runtime tracks core services, exposes a lightweight typed component registry, and owns shutdown actions/resources that should be cleaned up when the platform stops.

      Type Parameters:

      Parameters:
      name - resource name used for runtime registration
      Returns:
      managed resource handle

    • resource

      public <T extends AutoCloseable> MagicRuntimeResource<T> resource(String name, @Nullable T initial)

      Type Parameters:
      T - resource type
      Parameters:
      name - resource name used for runtime registration
      initial - initial resource, optionally null
      Returns:
      managed resource handle

    • bindConfig

      public <C, T extends AutoCloseable> MagicRuntimeConfigBinding<C,T> bindConfig(String name, Class<C> configClass, Function<C,? extends T> factory, String... sections)
      Creates a config-aware managed resource binding that rebuilds the resource when the target config changes.
      Type Parameters:
      C - config type
      T - resource type
      Parameters:
      name - resource name used for runtime registration
      configClass - config class driving the resource
      factory - resource factory receiving the current config instance
      sections - optional sections that should trigger a rebuild
      Returns:
      config-aware managed resource binding

    • close

      public void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
